Help & Advice

Stroud District Council

  • Find your councillor
  • Register to vote
  • Pay council tax
  • Parking fines
  • Report it
  • Have your say
  • Report a flood or possible cause of flooding

Gloucestershire County Council

  • Find your councillor
  • Education and learning
  • FixMyStreet
  • Flood guide
  • Highways
  • Customer services

Health

  • Gloucestershire Hospitals
  • Find a GP
  • Community Dental Service
  • Samaritans (116 123)
  • Shout (text ‘shout’ to 85258)
  • Be Well Gloucestershire
  • Every Mind Matters
  • Sunflowers Suicide Support

Homelessness

  • Marah
  • Shelter
  • StreetLink
  • Are you homeless now?
  • I’m at risk of being homeless
  • No Second Night Out (0870 383 3333)

Universal Credit & Welfare

  • Citizens Advice (0808 800 0510 or 0808 800 0511)
  • Community Hubs
  • Pension Credit calculator
  • Check benefits and financial support you can get
  • Cost of living support
  • MoneyHelper

Food

  • Stroud District Foodbank
  • Apply for free school meals (01452 425000)
  • Holiday free school meal vouchers

Disability Support

  • Allsorts (01453 750474)
  • Guideposts Community Hub (01453 767888 / 07894 256222)

Domestic Violence

  • Stroud Women’s Refuge (01453 764385)
  • National Domestic Violence Helpline (0808 2000 247)
  • Gloucestershire Domestic Abuse Support Service (01452 726570)
  • Domestic Abuse Helpline for Men (0808 8010327)

LGBTQ+

  • Galop (0800 999 5428)
  • Stroud Pride

Refugees & Asylum Seekers

  • Gloucestershire Action for Refugees and Asylum Seekers
  • Help and support for Ukraine
  • Homes for Ukraine scheme
